title: The Cooper Companies, Inc. (COO) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: The Cooper Companies, Inc. (NYSE:COO ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 31, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Kim Duncan – Vice President-Investor Relations and Risk Management Al White – President and Chief Executive Officer Brian Andrews – Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer Conference Call Participants Jason Bednar – Piper Sandler Larry Biegelsen – Wells Fargo Jon Block – Stifel Joanne Wuensch – Citi Matt Mishan – KeyBanc Jeff Johnson – Baird Steve Lichtman – Oppenheimer David Saxon – Needham Operator Good day. And thank you for standing by.

title: The Cooper Companies (COO) Lags Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: The Cooper Companies (COO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -0.31% and 1.44%, respectively, for the quarter ended July 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: CooperCompanies Announces Third Quarter 2022 Results
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Aug. 31, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (NYSE: COO) today announced financial results for its fiscal third quarter ended July 31, 2022.

title: Cooper Companies (COO) to Post Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Cooper Companies' (COO) fiscal third-quarter results are likely to reflect segmental strength.

title: CooperCompanies to Participate in the Wells Fargo Healthcare Conference
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Aug. 18, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (NYSE: COO), will participate in the Wells Fargo Healthcare Conference on Wednesday, September 7, 2022. Al White, President and CEO, will represent the Company in a session scheduled to begin at 1:20 PM ET.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Cooper Companies (COO) Stock Now
text: Cooper Companies (COO) continues to benefit from strength in its business segments. Its acquisitions are likely to boost the top line further.

title: Cooper Companies: The Perfect Harbor For A Perfect Storm
text: There is evidence to support the idea that Western populations are in decline. Current evidence suggests that the decline cannot be reversed.
